articles.title: Jemma Stapleton dies: What happened to the 25-year-old Australian sprinter?
articles.description: Australian athletics is mourning the loss of Jemma Stapleton, 25, who tragically passed away while on holiday in Thailand. A talented hurdles and sprint competitor, Stapleton was a Stawell Gift finalist and a rising star in the Victorian Athletic League. Her bright personality and dedication left a lasting impact on the athletics community.
